zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Ansel於1629年2月4日出生在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲時，她的父親John Ansell24歲，母親Katherine Goodrich23歲。她於1650年12月11日與Joseph Lathrop在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1713年5月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波享年84歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波洛斯羅普 希爾 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Ansel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a vernacular form of the personal name Anselmus; see Anselm . Jews borrowed the personal name Ansel from German Christians in the Middle Ages and commonly used it as a vernacular equivalent of the Biblical name Asher .
In some cases also an Americanized form of Slovenian Anzelj, Anžel, or Anželj: from old vernacular pet forms of the personal name Janez (see John ).

variants.name: Anselm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Klaus, Heinz.

English and German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Anshelm, composed of the elements ans- ‘god’ + helm ‘protection, helmet’. The personal name was taken to France and England by St. Anselm (c. 1033–1109), known as the Father of Scholasticism. He was born in Aosta, Italy, joined the Benedictine order at Bec in Normandy, France, and in 1093 became archbishop of Canterbury, England.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Ansel was born on 4 February 1629, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, her father, John Ansell, was 24 and her mother, Katherine Goodrich, was 23. She married Joseph Lathrop on 11 December 1650, in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 23 May 1713, in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 84, and was buried in Lothrop Hill Cemetery, Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States.

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Ansel(이)가 1629년 2월 4일 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Ansell(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Goodrich(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1650년 12월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 Joseph Lathrop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1713년 5월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 바른스타블일 로스럽 힐 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Ansel nasceu em 4 de fevereiro de 1629, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Ansell, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Goodrich, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Joseph Lathrop em 11 de dezembro de 1650, em Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de maio de 1713, em Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Lothrop Hill Cemetery, Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Ansel родилась 4 февраля 1629 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Ansell было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Goodrich, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Joseph Lathrop 11 декабря 1650 г. в местности барнстабл, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 23 мая 1713 г. в местности барнстабл, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности лотроп хилл кеметири, барнстабл, барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.
